plays.summary: It's 37°F at first pitch — cold air kills the ball and generally helps pitchers maintain grip and command. Suppressed run environment. Starters are evenly matched (Shane Smith 4.08 / Jacob Misiorowski 3.85 xFIP), and 18mph wind blowing In from CF tilts under. Model has 7.5, market is at 8.0 — under by -0.5 runs.

Tarik Skubal is at 3.14 xFIP — elite — going up against a near league average SDP lineup (102 wRC+). Tough spot for SDP's bats. The park (PF 95) gives pitchers an extra edge. Model has 7.5, market is at 7.0 — under by +0.5 runs.

Paul Skenes is at 3.12 xFIP — elite — going up against a near league average NYM lineup (106 wRC+). Tough spot for NYM's bats. The park (PF 94) gives pitchers an extra edge. Model has 7.7, market is at 7.0 — under by +0.7 runs.

transactions.description: Colorado Rockies placed RHP McCade Brown on the 15-day injured list retroactive to March 25, 2026.
